use_cases: Content section switching within a single page interface
Filtering or categorizing content without page navigation
Feature comparison or toggle between views
ai_summary: An animated tab switcher component that uses CSS clip-path transitions to create a smooth sliding highlight effect between tab options. The component accepts an array of tab objects with labels and manages active state internally. Features a pill-shaped container with a rounded clip-path animation that follows the selected tab, creating a polished, modern navigation experience for settings panels, filters, or content categorization.
